heading: Public participation in planning for defense environmental cleanup
label: 6179 Public participation in planning for defense environmental cleanup
text: The Secretary of Energy shall consult with the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency, the Attorney General, Governors and attorneys general of affected States, appropriate representatives of affected Indian tribes, and interested members of the public in any planning conducted by the Secretary for defense environmental cleanup activities at Department of Energy defense nuclear facilities.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2588 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
